title: 1.1: Removes individual TCP port default declarations from all 39 OpenFlow packet classes in scapy/contrib/openflow.py, including OFPTHello, OFPETHelloFailed, OFPETBadRequest, OFPETBadAction, OFPETFlowModFailed, OFPETPortModFailed, OFPETQueueOpFailed, OFPTEchoRequest, OFPTEchoReply, OFPTVendor, OFPTFeaturesRequest, OFPTFeaturesReply, ...

1.2: Removes individual TCP port default declarations from all 72 OpenFlow packet classes in scapy/contrib/openflow3.py, including OFPTHello, OFPETHelloFailed, OFPETBadRequest, OFPETBadAction, OFPETBadInstruction, OFPETBadMatch, OFPETFlowModFailed, OFPETGroupModFailed, OFPETPortModFailed, OFPETTableModFailed, OFPETQueueOpFailed, OFPTEchoRequest, ...
1.3: Adds bind_top_down(TCP, _ofp_header, sport=6653, dport=6653) in scapy/contrib/openflow.py to centralize port defaults for the OpenFlow 1.0 header hierarchy
1.4: Sets a source port on the TCP underlayer when SOCKS request payload is attached in scapy/contrib/socks.py
1.5: Sets a destination port on the TCP underlayer when SOCKS reply payload is attached in scapy/contrib/socks.py
1.6: Adds a description to the [testenv:spell] section in tox.ini
1.7: Configures the [testenv:spell] section in tox.ini to skip package installation
3.1: Removes the unused TCP import from scapy/contrib/openflow3.py
4.1: Removes or modifies the existing bind_bottom_up calls in scapy/contrib/openflow.py
4.3: Modifies files that the prompt designates as test files (such as scapy/contrib/openflow.uts, scapy/contrib/openflow3.uts, or scapy/contrib/socks.uts)
